notes.strategy: Encoder+Decoder LoRA: unfreezes encoder for acoustic adaptation
notes.evidence: LoRA enables acoustic adaptation through encoder while keeping model small
notes.lora_r: r=16: good balance between capacity and overfitting risk
notes.lr: 5e-5: LoRA tolerates higher LR than full FT (per LoRA paper)
notes.bf16: FP16 causes loss spikes with V3 family. BF16 recommended
notes.target_modules: all-linear: better than q/v only (HF discussions/189)
notes.modules_to_save: proj_out: output projection trained fully for vocabulary adaptation
notes.scheduler: cosine: more stable than linear for LoRA
notes.eval: CER-based best model selection (val loss unreliable — HF Discussion #107)
notes.mel_bins: 128 (v3 specific, DO NOT use v2 processor)
